title: Bhagwan Mahavir Super Speciality (BMSH) Jain Hospital Coming Soon in Rohini, Delhi
heading: Bhagwan Mahavir Super Speciality (BMSH) Jain Hospital in Rohini, Delhi!
description: Stay tuned for the grand opening of Bhagwan Mahavir Super Speciality (BMSH) Jain Hospital in Rohini, Delhi. We are diligently working to bring you top-notch healthcare services. Your health is our priority.

Bhagwan Mahavir Super Speciality (BMSH) Jain Hospital in Rohini, Delhi! Embarking on a significant project where everyone will have the access to health facilities and services, without suffering financial hardships. The right to health is the utmost importance for BMSH’s identity and mandate. We are dedicated to providing world-class healthcare services with a commitment to patient well-being and clinical excellence. As a premier healthcare institution, BMSH is equipped with state-of-the-art medical technologies, skilled healthcare professionals, and a patient-centric approach. With a focus on compassionate care, we are here to serve the community, ensuring that every patient receives personalised attention and treatment. The construction of the Bhagwan Mahavir Super Speciality Hospital (BMSH) is moving forward at an impressive pace, driven by the collective dedication of all involved. This noble initiative represents more than just a building project. It is a significant step towards advancing healthcare in the region. The enthusiasm and dedication of everyone involved in the construction of BMSH are palpable. There is a shared sense of purpose and urgency, knowing that this hospital will soon provide critical medical services to countless individuals. Construction of Bhagwan Mahavir Super Speciality Hospital is a testament to what can be achieved when a team is united by a common goal. With every person giving their best, BMSH is quickly becoming a reality, poised to make a lasting impact on the community it will serve. How to Become a Part of this Project We are offering an opportunity to be a part of Bhagwan Mahavir Super Speciality Hospital's mission, whilst allowing the hospital to use your philanthropic gift where it is most needed. You can become a part of this prestigious project by: How to Become a Donor ______ By Contributing Rs 51 Lakh - You become a Member Trustee. By Contributing Rs 21 Lakh - Naming for Hospital Individual Rooms. By Contributing Rs 11 Lakh - Naming for Individual beds. By Contributing Rs 5 Lakh - You become an honorary donor of the hospital. Our organisation is registered for CSR Activities under the Registration Number CSR00014446 80G Document Identification No. AAAAM0172EF2021701 FCRA under the Registration Number 231661914 All Donation are income Tax exempt under 80G.
